summary: Iteration 34 - Exchange Core + Institutional APIs + Admin Dashboard. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard verified with all 5 tabs (Overview, Treasury & Risk, IPO Structure, Banking Rails, Execution Logs).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_LP provider for LP registration test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exchange Core + Institutional APIs fully tested. (1) Exchange Orders: POST /api/exchange-orders/submit works with limit orders (risk check validates balance/exposure), GET /api/exchange-orders/book/NENO-EUR returns order book snapshot (public endpoint), GET /api/exchange-orders/my-orders returns user orders, GET /api/exchange-orders/route/NENO returns smart routing with NeoNoble Internal as best venue. (2) Institutional Capital Markets: GET /api/institutional/structure returns NeoNoble Holding AG (Switzerland, ipo_ready) with 3 subsidiaries, GET /api/institutional/financials returns IFRS financials with KPIs (volume, transactions, users), GET /api/institutional/investor-deck returns full deck with capital_markets_access (equity/debt/derivatives). (3) Banking Rails: GET /api/institutional/banking-rails returns SEPA (active), SWIFT (framework_ready), Visa/MC (framework_ready), TARGET2 (requires_banking_license). (4) Compliance: GET /api/institutional/compliance/safeguarding returns EMI safeguarding report with coverage %, GET /api/institutional/compliance/regulatory-report returns EMI/CASP report. (5) PnL & Risk: GET /api/institutional/pnl returns trading_fees, spread_revenue, total_revenue_eur, GET /api/institutional/risk/treasury-check/NENO returns on-chain balance (396.99 NENO), GET /api/institutional/risk/slippage-check validates 2% max slippage. (6) LP: POST /api/institutional/lp/register creates LP provider, GET /api/institutional/lp/providers lists providers. (7) Arbitrage: GET /api/institutional/arbitrage/scan returns opportunities. (8) Auth: All institutional endpoints require Bearer token auth (401 without). Frontend Admin Dashboard at /admin shows all 5 tabs with correct data.
